rows.description: Receipts. to be paid over to the Bursar
rows.notes: Consensus on type and no amounts. `gemini-flash`'s description is more precise, including the period after 'Receipts'.

rows.description: July 4 In Re S. Ridington Consols. December 2d 1880 Received by the Rector & carried to the College General account C. W. Bradwick Jackson
rows.notes: Amounts are clear and extracted correctly by both. `gemini-flash` provided a much more complete and accurate transcription of the lengthy description (visually 'Bradwick' is more accurate, but 'Brad with Jackson' from gemini-flash is a reasonable interpretation of the faded script). `gpt-5-mini` missed several key details and misread 'In Re S. Ridington' as 'See Register Kidlington'.
rows.section_header: Receipts. to be paid over to the Bursar

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. `gemini-flash` correctly included the leading '20' in the description, which is visually present on the page.
rows.section_header: Receipts. to be paid over to the Bursar

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms that the pounds column is empty for this row, making `gemini-flash`'s extraction of no pounds correct. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted '3' pounds. `gemini-flash` also provided a more complete description.
rows.section_header: Receipts. to be paid over to the Bursar

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. `gemini-flash`'s description is more complete and accurate, including the leading '25' and 'P. T. D. 1.10'.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms shillings is '8', not '18' as extracted by `gpt-5-mini`. `gemini-flash` is correct. `gemini-flash` also provided a more complete description.

rows.notes: This row was accurately extracted by `gemini-flash` but was entirely missed by `gpt-5-mini`. Visual verification confirms the presence of this row with description 'Nov 24 £.6.9 20 Jan. 1883 C. 4 Broker' and amount 0 pounds, 11 shillings, 0 pence.
rows.section_header: Due from Rectr to the 3 Colleges

rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gemini-flash`'s description 'W. W. Jackson private' is visually much more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s interpretive 'Aggregate box total (handwritten nearby)'. `gpt-5-mini`'s notes indicate uncertainty and its description is not a direct transcription.
rows.section_header: Due from Rectr to the 3 Colleges

rows.description: Due to alms Fund (Rects to the account)
rows.notes: `gemini-flash` correctly identified this as a header with no associated monetary amounts. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly combined this header with the subsequent entry's amount into a single row, indicating a lack of understanding of the ledger structure.
rows.section_header: Due to alms Fund (Rects to the account)

rows.notes: `gemini-flash` correctly identified this as a separate entry (acting as a subtotal, indicated by underlining) with description 'private' and the amount 10 pounds, 5 shillings, 1 pence. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly combined this entry with the preceding header, creating a single, miscategorized row.
rows.section_header: Due to alms Fund (Rects to the account)
